plugins.name: synthpanel-bmad
plugins.description: SynthPanel — Synthetic Deliberation Panels. A BMad expansion pack: Quinn (the Panel Facilitator agent) plus convene/extend/render workflows that wrap the SynthPanel MCP tools (run_panel, run_quick_poll, extend_panel) for structured multi-persona deliberation on hard-to-reverse product decisions. Pre-1.0 — breaking changes possible until 1.0.0.
